name: Ningbo Tuopu Group Co., Ltd.
summary: Ningbo Tuopu Group Co., Ltd. researches, develops, manufactures, and sells automobile parts to automobile manufacturers in China and internationally. The company offers vibration control products, including powertrain mounting systems, chassis bushings, rubber metal parts, torsional vibrational dampers, and aluminum die-casting products; interior and trunk trims, interior trim materials, and acoustic and insulation products; and power chassis systems, such as sub-frames, control arms, and steering knuckles. It also provides mechatronic systems comprising intelligent brake systems, electric power steering columns, automotive mechanical steering gears, electronic vacuum pumps, brake vacuum switches, electric wastegate actuators, electronic water and purge pumps, seat pneumatic comfort systems, and electronic stability controls; and light alloy structural parts, including shock towers, torsion beams, chassis brackets, longitudinal beams, and B-pillars. The company was founded in 1983 and is headquartered in Ningbo, China.
